/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/lib CMakeFiles/test_io.dir/test_io.cpp.o -o test_io  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniconda/base/envs/general/lib student_build/libdataframelib.a /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniconda/base/envs/general/lib/libparquet.1900.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniconda/base/envs/general/lib/libarrow.1900.0.0.dylib
